data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for typed artifact metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of typed artifact metadata linked to session interaction events. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that any artifacts are linked to these events, leading to an inconclusive result. The prior step evidence indicates a lack of concrete linkage, as noted in the blocked status of the previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1).
gaps: No evidence of artifact rows linked to session interaction events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
